title: Manager Hiring
description: Assign managers to routes, fisheries, and other operations. As the player expands, direct management becomes impossible. Managers take over day-to-day operations with varying effectiveness.
definition-of-done: Manager hiring from available pool. Managers assignable to operations. Manager stats affect performance. Manager salaries as ongoing cost.
testing-plan: Verify manager hiring works. Test assignment to operations. Verify stat effects. Test salary costs.
